title: ammoides atlantica
intro: Ammoides atlantica, also known as Atlantic fleabane or fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ammoides atlantica include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
